2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, io_buffer_register_bvec(), which allows registering an array of bio vectors (bvecs) to be used in the io_uring context. This is a preparatory step for implementing zero-copy support over fuse using io_uring. The function takes several parameters, including the io_uring command, the bvec array, and flags for issue and release. It initializes an io_mapped_ubuf structure and copies the provided bvecs into it. If successful, it returns 0; otherwise, it returns a negative error code.
